description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by dense landscaping, including a variety of trees and palms. The structure features a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, with large windows that allow for ample natural light. The front of the house includes a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a pool, bordered by a wooden deck. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with some natural wood accents visible on the patio and deck. The landscaping is lush and provides privacy, with trees encircling much of the property. The overall design emphasizes open, outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between the interior and exterior environments.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious patio with a pool, surrounded by dense trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the patio, pool, and surrounding trees, with the main entrance partially visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the rear, with the flat roof and upper story visible, and dense trees obscuring much of the lower structure.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, showing the house nestled among trees, with the patio and pool area partially visible.
description_view_3: View 3 is a direct front view, clearly displaying the main entrance, patio, pool, and the arrangement of outdoor furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, steps leading up from the patio, and is framed by large windows and a covered overhang.
